name: NVM Studio
description: View and edit files in hex, with AUTOSAR NVM (non-volatile memory) dump analysis (NVM Studio)
nvmstudio.inspectorType: Where the data inspector should be shown in the hex editor.
nvmstudio.maxFileSize: The max file size (in MB) that the editor will try to open before warning you.
nvmstudio.dataInspector.autoReveal: Whether to auto reveal the data inspector when the hex editor is opened.
nvmstudio.defaultEndianness: The endianness selected when loading the editor.
nvmstudio.columnWidth: The number of bytes per row to show in the editor.
nvmstudio.showDecodedText: Whether decoded text should be shown in the editor.
nvmstudio.showOpenFileButton: Show Hex Editor button in editor menu.
nvmStudio.openFile: Open Active File in Hex Editor
nvmstudio.copyType: Sets the default format in which bytes are copied
